use_cases: Display partner or client logos on a company landing page with automatic cycling
Showcase tech stack integrations in a developer tools product
Feature brand collaborations in a media or creator platform
Highlight client logos in a SaaS pricing or hero section
Present portfolio clients or integrations in agency websites
ai_summary: A 3D animated logo carousel component that automatically cycles through brand logos (Amazon, Google, Meta, Github, Twitch) with smooth flip animations. Uses framer-motion for transitions and CSS 3D transforms for depth, featuring a dark theme with flat-colored logo icons in rounded containers. Designed for showcasing integrations, partnerships, or tech stacks in SaaS and dev-tools landing pages or hero sections.
